final_text:
{
  "review_summary": "The developer output aligns well with the architect output. All functional and non-functional requirements are covered. Security and performance considerations are adequately addressed. However, some details on maintainability practices and specific test cases are missing.",
  "architecture_alignment": [
    "The microservices architecture pattern is correctly implemented.",
    "Technology stack matches the architect output.",
    "Modules and services are clearly defined and align with the architect output."
  ],
  "security_findings": [
    "OAuth2 authentication is implemented.",
    "HTTPS and encryption are used for secure communication."
  ],
  "performance_findings": [
    "Microservices architecture supports scalability.",
    "Use of Docker for containerization aids in performance and deployment consistency."
  ],
  "maintainability_findings": [
    "RESTful API design principles are followed.",
    "Global error handling middleware is implemented.",
    "Unit tests are recommended for each service."
  ],
  "missing_items": [
    "Specific test cases are not detailed.",
    "Detailed documentation for developer handoff is not provided."
  ],
  "recommendations": [
    "Provide detailed test cases for QA handoff.",
    "Include comprehensive documentation for developer and deployment handoff."
  ]
}
